news.summary: Donald Trump and Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian signed a preliminary agreement on Wednesday in a bid to end the conflict between the two countries.

keyLevels.note: Leading the tape at $740.62 — key for risk appetite
Pivot $746.74 — bulls want to hold above

gamePlan: Bias into tomorrow: Bullish — favor calls / long delta.
Use QQQ $740.62 as the risk-on/off line; trade with it, not against it.
Primary idea: AMD CALL — enter $26.36–$29.14, target $41.63+, stop $16.65.
Keep total options exposure modest; one A+ setup beats five marginal ones.
report.narrative: Stocks closed higher with SPY +0.78% and QQQ +2.51%. Composite sentiment +50 (Bullish). The tape is being driven mainly by qqq / mega-cap tech, vix, spy trend. VIX at 13.24 (-3.52%). Environment read: favor calls / long delta. Leadership came from Consumer Discretionary; Energy lagged. Today's standouts: AMD +4.86%, AVGO +4.70%. Laggards: JPM -2.47%, XOM -2.08%. Carrying AMD as the top idea into tomorrow (7.5/10).
report.riskWarning: Options trading is risky and can result in the loss of the entire premium paid. This report provides analysis and educational information only — not financial advice. Size positions small (1–2% of capital per idea), honor stops, and do your own research.
